opinion.h: Robert G. STONE and Carrie M. Stone, Trustees under Will of Galen L. Stone, petitioners, v. Thomas W. WHITE, Former Collector of Internal Revenue at Boston, Massachusetts.* No. 202.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Thomas Allen, of Boston, Mass., for petitioners.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the First Circuit denied.
* Motion to extend time to file petition for rehearing granted 296 U.S. 550, 56 S. Ct. 245.
